concerns.text: FR-001 mandates a hard minimum of 8 ecosystems with complete trait data. Tasks T012-T013 implement the download and heuristic mapping but lack a specific task to enforce the minimum threshold (e.g., 'Validate ecosystem count >= 8; fail pipeline if < 8'). Without this, the system may silently proceed with insufficient data, violating the spec's hard constraint.

SC-004 requires quantifying the 'trait gap' by comparing the observed model against a 'saturated model' (using all known interaction features). The plan explicitly adopts a 'Trait-Only' strategy and excludes species/ecosystem IDs. No task exists to implement the 'saturated model' baseline required to calculate this specific metric, leaving SC-004 unaddressed.

SC-003 requires measuring generalizability by comparing the held-out ecosystem AUC against the 'cross-validation mean'. The plan replaces the single held-out test with LOEO. Tasks T034-T037 implement LOEO but do not explicitly define a task to calculate and report the 'CV mean' baseline (e.g., mean of internal 5-fold CV on the full dataset) required to satisfy the comparison logic in SC-003.

FR-007 requires negative samples from pairs that are 'spatially and temporally co-occurring'. Task T014 implements negative sample generation but the plan admits temporal metadata is often unavailable and relies solely on spatial co-occurrence. There is no specific task to validate the presence of temporal metadata or to implement a fallback mitigation strategy (e.g., flagging ecosystems where temporal data is missing) to address the strict 'temporal' requirement of the spec.
